name: ISO 27001 Gap Assessment 2026
description: Gap analysis against ISO 27001:2022 controls in preparation for certification

name: Annual Access Review 2026
description: Comprehensive annual review of all user access across production systems

name: GDPR Art. 17
description: Right to erasure (right to be forgotten)

metadata.sla: Completed within 2 weeks of quarter start

name: Change Approval Board
description: Weekly CAB meeting for production changes

metadata.sla: P1: 15 min response, P2: 1 hour, P3: 4 hours

name: Security Awareness Training
description: Annual security training for all employees

metadata.sla: All employees completed within 30 days of launch

name: Employee Onboarding
description: End-to-end onboarding process for new hires including IT provisioning, training, and compliance enrollment

metadata.sla: Full onboarding completed within 5 business days of start date

name: Employee Offboarding
description: Offboarding process including access revocation, asset collection, and exit procedures

metadata.sla: Access revoked within 4 hours of termination; assets collected within 5 business days

name: Vendor Onboarding
description: Third-party vendor assessment, contract review, and onboarding into vendor management program

metadata.sla: Vendor risk assessment completed within 15 business days of request

name: Budget Planning Cycle
description: Annual budgeting and quarterly reforecasting process

metadata.sla: Annual budget finalized by December 15; quarterly reforecasts within 2 weeks of quarter close

name: Sprint Planning
description: Bi-weekly sprint planning and backlog grooming for engineering teams

metadata.sla: Sprint goals defined and communicated before sprint start

name: Incident Response
description: 24/7 security incident response including containment, eradication, recovery, and post-incident review

metadata.sla: P1: 15 min acknowledgment, 1 hour containment; post-mortem within 5 business days

name: Penetration Testing
description: Annual external penetration test of production systems and customer-facing applications

metadata.sla: Findings report delivered within 2 weeks of test completion; critical findings remediated within 30 days

name: Data Pipeline Framework
description: Proprietary ETL framework for analytics ingestion

name: Ransomware — Production K8s Cluster
description: Encryption of production workloads by threat actor

metadata.treatment_plan: Network segmentation, immutable backups, EDR on nodes

name: Ransomware — Data Warehouse
description: Encryption of analytics data by threat actor

metadata.treatment_plan: Snowflake Time Travel, cross-region replication, access controls

name: Data Breach — Customer Portal PII
description: Unauthorized access to customer PII via web application

metadata.treatment_plan: WAF, SAST/DAST scanning, access reviews, encryption at rest

name: Data Breach — Data Warehouse PII
description: Unauthorized access to customer PII in analytics platform

metadata.treatment_plan: Column-level masking, role-based access, query audit logging

name: Supply Chain Attack — CI/CD Pipeline
description: Compromised dependency injected via build pipeline

metadata.treatment_plan: Dependency scanning, SBOM generation, signed builds, pinned versions

name: Key Person Dependency — Recommendation Engine
description: Loss of ML model knowledge if key staff leave

metadata.treatment_plan: Documentation, cross-training, model registry with versioning

name: Key Person Dependency — Platform Architecture
description: Loss of architecture knowledge if key staff leave

metadata.treatment_plan: Architecture Decision Records, team rotations, shared documentation

name: GDPR Non-Compliance — Customer PII
description: Failure to meet GDPR obligations for customer data

metadata.treatment_plan: DPO oversight, DSAR process, retention automation, annual GDPR training

name: GDPR Non-Compliance — DSAR Process
description: Failure to fulfill data subject access requests within deadline

metadata.treatment_plan: Semi-automated DSAR tooling, SLA tracking, escalation path
Multi-AZ deployment, auto-scaling, chaos engineering, runbooks
Blue-green deploys, health checks, CDN failover, synthetic monitoring

name: Unauthorized Access — Identity Provider
description: Compromise of SSO/MFA system granting broad access

metadata.treatment_plan: Phishing-resistant MFA, admin session limits, break-glass procedures, Okta threat detection

name: Insider Threat — Data Exfiltration
description: Malicious or negligent insider exfiltrating sensitive data

metadata.treatment_plan: DLP tools, USB restrictions, anomaly detection on data access patterns, least-privilege access

name: Third-Party API Downtime
description: Extended outage of critical third-party APIs (Stripe, Okta, Snowflake)

metadata.treatment_plan: Circuit breakers, graceful degradation, multi-vendor strategy for critical paths

name: Regulatory Fine — Data Retention Violation
description: Fine due to retaining data beyond legally permitted periods

metadata.treatment_plan: Automated retention enforcement, quarterly audits of data lifecycle, DPO review

name: Shadow IT — Unapproved SaaS Usage
description: Employees using unapproved SaaS tools that bypass security controls

metadata.treatment_plan: SaaS discovery tool, acceptable use enforcement, approved alternatives catalog

name: MFA Enforcement
description: Multi-factor authentication required for all users

name: Quarterly Access Review Control
description: Periodic review of user access rights across all systems

name: Encryption at Rest
description: AES-256 encryption for all data at rest

name: WAF — Customer Portal
description: Web application firewall protecting customer-facing endpoints

name: SAST/DAST Scanning
description: Static and dynamic application security testing in CI/CD

name: Network Segmentation
description: Micro-segmentation between production, staging, and corporate networks

name: INC-2026-001 — Okta MFA Bypass
description: Phishing campaign bypassed MFA for 3 users via AiTM proxy

metadata.root_cause: Adversary-in-the-middle proxy captured session tokens; non-phishing-resistant MFA in use
metadata.impact_summary: 3 accounts compromised, no data exfiltration confirmed
metadata.lessons_learned: Migrate to FIDO2/WebAuthn MFA; add conditional access policies for high-risk sign-ins

name: INC-2026-002 — Staging Data Leak
description: Customer PII found in staging environment due to DB clone without masking

metadata.root_cause: Staging DB refreshed from production without running masking pipeline
metadata.impact_summary: ~12,000 customer records exposed in staging; access limited to engineering team
metadata.lessons_learned: Automated masking in DB refresh pipeline; added pre-refresh validation check

name: INC-2025-047 — CI/CD Pipeline Outage
description: Jenkins controller OOM caused 6-hour deployment freeze

metadata.root_cause: Memory leak in Jenkins plugin caused controller OOM after 30 days uptime
metadata.impact_summary: No production deployments for 6 hours; hotfix delayed
metadata.lessons_learned: Weekly Jenkins restart scheduled; memory monitoring alert added; evaluating migration to Tekton

name: SOC 2
description: SOC 2 Type II trust services criteria

metadata.scope: All production systems processing customer data

name: PCI DSS v4.0
description: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard version 4.0

metadata.scope: Cardholder data environment — Customer Portal and Stripe integration
All processing of EU resident personal data
